summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Perfectly Good admin panel features and convenience fee implementation. Backend APIs mostly working, frontend has admin access issues.

minor_issues.issue: DELETE endpoint has minor test code bug but functionality works
minor_issues.impact: Low - soft delete functionality works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Admin panel not accessible at /admin route - shows 'Admin access required' even for logged-in admin

integration_issues.issue: Admin login works but /admin route redirects to home with 'Admin access required' message

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/vendors - creates new vendor with user account
GET /api/vendor/menu - vendor gets their own menu items
POST /api/vendor/drops - creates drop FROM menu item (menu_item_id, discounted_price, quantity, pickup times)
Convenience fee: POST /api/orders/create returns item_total, convenience_fee, total fields with correct 5% calculation
Home page shows 10 drops with 9 images (exceeds requirement of 8)
Access control: 403 returned when non-admin tries admin endpoints
Vendor drop creation from menu items works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin panel frontend access - admin users cannot access /admin route even after successful login. The backend admin endpoints work correctly, but the frontend routing or authentication check for admin panel is broken.
